summary: The diff implements a comprehensive Snapgram social media app covering most requirements. The backend (REQ-12) is replaced with a new Motoko actor supporting profiles, posts, likes, follows, and comments with auth gating. The frontend (REQ-13) includes all required pages. React Query hooks (REQ-14) are implemented. Visual theme (REQ-15) uses warm gradient palette. Brand images (REQ-16) are referenced. A few gaps exist: the hooks file does not expose the exact hook names required by REQ-14, the RequireAuth component shows an inline prompt rather than redirecting, and the generated image assets are referenced but not present as actual files in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement hooks named: useProfile, useFeed, useExplorePosts, useUserPosts, useCreatePost, useLikePost, useFollowUser, useAddComment, useComments
missing_requirements.reason: The hooks file uses different names (useGetAllPosts, useGetUserProfile, useGetPostsByUser, useGetComments, etc.) instead of the specified hook names like useFeed, useExplorePosts, useUserPosts, useProfile. While functionally equivalent hooks exist, the specified interface names are not all present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Unauthenticated users are redirected to the landing/login page for all protected routes
missing_requirements.reason: RequireAuth shows an inline sign-in card rather than redirecting to the landing page. The spec requires redirection to the landing/login page.

missing_requirements.requirement: Store images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated
missing_requirements.reason: The diff references the image paths in components but no actual image files are listed as added files in the diff. The diff shows 14 added files and none are the image assets themselves.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate migration module file (backend/migration.mo) was added to handle data migration from the old shinchan diary schema to the new Snapgram schema
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint states all Motoko logic must remain in a single actor file (backend/main.mo), yet a separate migration.mo module was created. Additionally, the non-goals explicitly state 'Preserving or migrating the existing shinchan diary data model'.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupDialog — An automatic first-time profile setup modal dialog was added that appears when an authenticated user has no profile
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement specified an automatic profile setup dialog flow. REQ-13 mentions an Edit Profile page but does not require an onboarding dialog.

hallucinated_features.description: getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile backend methods were added alongside the specified createProfile/getProfile/updateProfile methods
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-12 specifies the exact methods to expose. getCallerUserProfile and saveCallerUserProfile are additional methods not listed in the requirements.
